Lit by a harsh high desert sun — a warm rim light burns along the helmet crest and upper shoulders. Grim, weighty, battle-scarred — never cute, never photorealistic, never a clean flat vector. The figure touches nothing and stands on nothing: no ground, no cast shadow, no dust at the feet, no backdrop, no glow. No text.
